qa_pairs.question: Which user profiles have exactly 890 followers?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.followers = 890

qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.partitionid = 2

qa_pairs.question: Who posted a tweet exactly saying Hello I'm Tony Stark. on March 9, 2018 at 20:00:14?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE tweets.createdate = '2018-03-09 20:00:14' AND tweets.text = 'Hello I''m Tony Stark.'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which user profiles entities having at least one related tweets record (linked on user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid) with createdate equal to '2018-03-09 20:00:14' and text equal to 'Hello I'?
